titleStmt.title: SII 38.386: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 386. (A.R. No. 386 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Achytadēva mahārāya Year: Śaka 1454, Nandana, Āvaṇi 25.

summary.p: Records that Koṇḍama Nāyakkar of Śeṟṟuppaṭṭu granted land at Vaṇṇāntāṅgal in Kaṇṇaṉūr as uḻavukāṇi to the god, uḍaiyār Tirumalar-uḍaiyanayiṉār at Dēvakkāpuram, a dēvasthāṉam in Palkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, for the merit of the king, Achchudadēva mahārāya. Further he is also said to have made arrangements for the remittance of ten paṇam every year for conducting the waking up ceremony (tiruppaḷḷi-eḻuchchi) of the above god.
The temple accountant Uttaṇḍar figures as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cuvastiśrī maṉmakāmaṇṭalecura metiṉi micura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva Accutatevamakārāyar piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā
niṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 5 10 4- mel cellāniṉṟa naṉtaṉavaruṣam Āvaṇimātam 2 10 5 ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalam palkuṉṟa nāṭu
tevastāṉam tevakkāpuram Uṭaiyār tirumalaruṭaiyanayiṉāṟku Accutatevamakārāyarukku tanmamāka ceṟṟuppaṭṭu koṇṭamaṉāyakkar
viṭṭa kaṇṇaṉūr vaṇṇāntāṅkal vacivarāci Uḻavukāṇiyāka paṇṇikkoṇṭu tirumalaruṭaiya nayiṉārukku tiruppaḷḷi Eḻicci
ciṟappukku Atikaciṟappukku varuṣam Oṉṟukku ø10 yinta paṇam pattum varuṣam varuṣam vettu cukattileyirukka kaṭavarākavum
Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku Uttaṇṭar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.386 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
